metadata.description: Maps each deduplicated threat to its discovering Phase B specialists for confidence analysis

TECH-H001.title: MorphoBlueConnector._getPositionTVL Adds Borrow Amount Instead of Subtracting, Inflating Vault TVL
TECH-H001.duplicate_group_description: MorphoBlueConnector._getPositionTVL adds borrowAmount instead of subtracting it, inflating vault TVL by ~2x the borrow value (plus double-counting via held tokens)

TECH-H002.title: Registry onlyVaultMaintainer Modifier Uses OR Instead of AND, Requiring Both Maintainer AND Emergency Roles
TECH-H002.duplicate_group_description: Registry onlyVaultMaintainer modifier uses || instead of && in revert condition, requiring BOTH maintainer AND EMERGENCY_ROLE instead of EITHER

TECH-H003.title: Registry Swap-and-Pop Position Removal Corrupts isPositionUsed Mapping via Wrong Key Computation
TECH-H003.duplicate_group_description: Registry swap-and-pop position removal corrupts isPositionUsed mapping by recomputing key with calculatorConnector instead of original msg.sender

ECON-H004.title: AerodromeConnector TVL Ignores Gauge-Staked LP Tokens, Causing Systematic TVL Underreporting
ECON-H004.duplicate_group_description: AerodromeConnector._getPositionTVL ignores gauge-staked LP tokens, counting only IERC20(pool).balanceOf and missing staked balance

TECH-H005.title: resetMiddle for Withdraw Queue Does Not Reset totalCBAmount, Enabling Double-Counting on Re-Calculation
TECH-H005.duplicate_group_description: resetMiddle for withdraw queue does not reset currentWithdrawGroup.totalCBAmount, causing double-counting when requests are recalculated

TECH-H006.title: calculateWithdrawShares Callable During Fulfilled-But-Not-Executed State, Orphaning Calculated Amounts
TECH-H006.duplicate_group_description: Withdraw group state machine allows calculateWithdrawShares during fulfilled-but-not-executed state (isStarted=true, isFullfilled=true), orphaning accumulated totalCBAmount when executeWithdraw deletes the group

TECH-H007.title: UNIv3Connector._getPositionTVL Uses Aggregate Pool Position Key, Potentially Overstating TVL
TECH-H007.duplicate_group_description: UNIv3Connector._getPositionTVL uses aggregate pool position key (positionManager, tickLower, tickUpper) instead of specific NFT tokenId, overstating TVL

TECH-H008.title: collectManagementFees Underflows When preformanceFeeSharesWaitingForDistribution Exceeds totalSupply Minus Fee Receiver Balances
TECH-H008.duplicate_group_description: collectManagementFees underflows when preformanceFeeSharesWaitingForDistribution (unminted) plus fee receiver balances exceeds totalSupply

TECH-H009.title: UniswapValueOracle Silently Truncates Amount to uint128, Causing Severe Price Underreporting
TECH-H009.duplicate_group_description: UniswapValueOracle.getValue silently truncates uint256 amount to uint128, producing incorrect valuations for large token amounts

ECON-H002.title: ChainlinkOracleConnector Missing Feed Decimals Normalization Causes Systematic Price Misquoting
ECON-H002.duplicate_group_description: ChainlinkOracleConnector does not normalize output using feed.decimals(), causing systematic price misquoting for cross-decimal token pairs

ECON-H009.title: Flash Loan Address Grants Global Manager Access Across All Vaults and Connectors
ECON-H009.duplicate_group_description: Flash loan address in onlyManager modifier grants global manager access across all vaults and connectors, enabling privilege escalation if set to a public flash loan provider

ECON2-H004.title: Connector Token Drain via Empty Watcher Verification
ECON2-H004.duplicate_group_description: Watchers.verifyRemoveLiquidity is an empty function (no-op), completely bypassing the intended withdrawal verification security mechanism

TECH2-H003.title: Unprivileged share burn enables grief/denial of withdrawals by permanently locking shares in withdrawRequestsByAddress
TECH2-H003.duplicate_group_description: Unrestricted burnShares function allows users to burn shares locked by pending withdrawal requests, potentially bricking withdrawal execution

TECH-H018.title: NoyaValueOracle multi-hop routing uses wrong variable in loop, potentially mispricing routes longer than 1 hop
TECH-H018.duplicate_group_description: NoyaValueOracle multi-hop routing passes original asset instead of intermediate quotingToken in recursive call, breaking routes with 2+ hops

TECH-H014.title: Active connector can drain arbitrary tokens from AccountingManager via unprotected sendTokensToTrustedAddress()
TECH-H014.duplicate_group_description: AccountingManager.sendTokensToTrustedAddress allows any active connector to drain arbitrary tokens without per-operation authorization or accounting checks

ECON-H023.title: Public TVL Drop Check Allows Performance Fee Griefing
ECON-H023.duplicate_group_description: Public checkIfTVLHasDroped allows anyone to reset pending performance fees during temporary TVL dips, enabling griefing of strategy managers

TECH2-H007.title: Deposit limit check uses TVL() after transferFrom but before totalAWFDeposit update, enabling grief rejection near cap
TECH2-H007.duplicate_group_description: Deposit TVL check runs after baseToken transfer but before totalAWFDeposit update, causing inflated TVL and premature deposit limit rejection

TECH-H004.title: AerodromeConnector._getPositionTVL Ignores Gauge-Staked LP Tokens, Understating TVL

TECH-H010.title: ChainlinkOracleConnector Does Not Account for Feed Decimal Precision, Causing Incorrect Price Calculations

TECH-H011.title: Flash Loan Address Has Full Manager Access Across All Vaults and Connectors

TECH-H012.title: Watchers.verifyRemoveLiquidity Is Empty No-Op, Providing Zero Withdrawal Verification

TECH-H013.title: Unrestricted share burning lets users grief/brick their own withdrawals by underflowing withdrawRequestsByAddress during execution

TECH-H015.title: Withdrawal-group accounting can be corrupted by calculating new withdrawals while a group is fulfilled (isStarted=true,isFullfilled=true)

TECH-H016.title: Registry swap-and-pop removal updates isPositionUsed with wrong key, corrupting position index mapping and potentially bricking TVL/position management

TECH-H017.title: Chainlink oracle decimal normalization bug can misprice TVL by orders of magnitude for non-18 base tokens (e.g., USDC)
